message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant sdx_downstream as "sdx_downstream"
    participant downstream_quarantine as "downstream_quarantine"
    participant Downstream as "Downstream"
    participant Store as "Store"
    participant TransformCS as "TransformCS"
    participant Sequence as "Sequence"
    participant Postgres as "Postgres"
    participant FTP as "FTP"

    Note over sdx_downstream, downstream_quarantine: Consume tx_id

    actor sdx_downstream
    actor downstream_quarantine

    Note over Downstream, Store: break [error]
    Note over Downstream, downstream_quarantine: break [error]

    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: alt [common-software]
        Note over Downstream, TransformCS: [cora]
        Note over Downstream, TransformCS: [cord]
    end alt

    Note over Downstream, Store: break [error]
    Note over Downstream, downstream_quarantine: break [error]

    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: POST /common-software/{sequence_no}
    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: POST /cora/{sequence_no}
    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: POST /cord/{sequence_no}

    Note over Downstream, Sequence: GET /image-sequence?n
    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: return list

    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: Return Zip
    Note over Downstream, downstream_quarantine: Unzip
    Note over Downstream, Downstream: Send files

    Note over sdx_downstream, downstream_quarantine: Consume tx_id

    Note over Downstream, Store: GET /responses/{tx_id}
    Note over Downstream, Store: return response json

    Note over Downstream, Sequence: GET /sequence
    Note over Downstream, Sequence: return number

    Note over Postgres, FTP: Postgres
    Note over Postgres, FTP: FTP

    Note over Downstream, Store: break [error]
    Note over Downstream, downstream_quarantine: break [error]

    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: POST /common-software/{sequence_no}
    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: POST /cora/{sequence_no}
    Note over Downstream, TransformCS: POST /cord/{sequence_no}
